{{CargoRelic
|name=Gecko Tail Specimen
|class_id=20080
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=A gecko that frequented the mall had to break its tail trying to survive under the taps of big spenders! The fallen-off tail is soaked in formalin to keep its color and freshness. It's one of the favorite collectables of the spenders!
|fame=18
|art=12
|fth=16
|civ=31
|tech=13
|ss1=Zombie Gene research Cell cost -0.6%
|ss2=Zombie Gene research Cell cost -1.2%
|ss3=Zombie Gene research Cell cost -1.8%
|ss4=Zombie Gene research Cell cost -1.8%
|ss7=Zombie Gene research Cell cost -1.8%<br> (Awakened)
}}
